BaselineCodecError.docs: T008: deleted. Old baseline codec error for the TypeBaseline-based evaluator. Replaced by BaselineRustdocCodecError.

BaselineRustdocCodec.docs: Codec struct that loads rustdoc_types::Crate JSON from the filesystem (Baseline B or Current C).

BaselineRustdocCodecError.docs: Error type for loading rustdoc_types::Crate JSON as Baseline (B) or Current (C). thiserror #[from] generates From<serde_json::Error> and From<io::Error>; declared here without generic args (core::convert::From) so the signal evaluator covers them via generic-args-stripped fallback.

CatalogueDocumentCodecError.docs: Error type for the new CatalogueDocument serde codec. Replaces TypeCatalogueCodecError. thiserror #[from] generates From<serde_json::Error> and From<io::Error>; declared here without generic args (core::convert::From) so the signal evaluator covers them via generic-args-stripped fallback.

CatalogueDocumentCodec.docs: Stateless codec struct that encodes/decodes CatalogueDocument to/from JSON (schema_version=3).

CatalogueToExtendedCrateCodec.docs: Codec struct that converts CatalogueDocument into ExtendedCrate (TypeGraph A).

CatalogueToExtendedCrateCodecError.docs: Error type for the Catalogue -> ExtendedCrate (TypeGraph A) codec.

EvaluateSignalsError.docs: Existing error type for the execute_type_signals_for_layer infrastructure function (the new T008 entry point replacing the deleted evaluate_and_write_signals). The old evaluate_and_write_signals/validate_action_diagnostics/validate_and_write_catalogue functions are deleted; execute_type_signals_for_layer is the active caller.

FsCatalogueLoader.docs: Existing FsCatalogueLoader. Modified to load CatalogueDocument instead of TypeCatalogueDocument.

FsCatalogueSpecSignalsStore.docs: Existing FsCatalogueSpecSignalsStore. Referenced — not modified in this track.

InMemoryCatalogueLinter.docs: Existing InMemoryCatalogueLinter. Modified to use CatalogueDocument in run() parameter.

EdgeSet.docs: T008: deleted (previously a stub). Was an edge set for type_graph_render which was removed when TypeGraph was deleted.

RustdocSchemaExporter.docs: T008: modified. RustdocSchemaExporter is now also the 'C' producer for the new 3-way evaluator. Trait impl surface changed from baseline snapshot.

SchemaExportCodecError.docs: Existing error type for the SchemaExport -> TypeGraph codec. Referenced for continuity.

SignalEvaluatorV2.docs: Phase 1 + Phase 2 signal evaluator struct. Stateless struct driving the 2-phase algorithm.

ClusterPlan.docs: T008: deleted. Was a clustering plan struct in type_graph_cluster, removed with TypeGraph.

CrossEdge.docs: T008: deleted. Was a cross-cluster edge in type_graph_cluster, removed with TypeGraph.

SignalSummary.docs: T008: deleted. Was a summary type produced by the old TypeBaseline-based signal evaluator.

TypeGraphExportError.docs: T008: deleted. Was the error type for type_graph_export functions. Removed with TypeGraph.

TypeGraphRenderOptions.docs: T008: deleted. Was the options struct for type_graph_render functions. Removed with TypeGraph.

TypeCatalogueCodecError.docs: Old codec error for TypeCatalogueDocument (schema_version=2). No new v2 files are created (v2 format retired per CN-09), but existing track directories may still contain v2 catalogue files. load_all_catalogues tries v3 first and falls back to v2; this error surfaces only when both codecs fail. Scheduled for deletion in a follow-up track when all v2 catalogue files are migrated.

LoadAllCataloguesError.docs: Errors surfaced by load_all_catalogues. Modified: added V3StubConversion variant (new in this track for v3→v2-stub conversion). Decode variant uses TypeCatalogueCodecError because load_all_catalogues tries v3 first and falls back to the v2 codec when v3 decode fails — existing pre-migration track directories may still have v2 catalogue files. No new v2 files are created (v2 format retired per CN-09). thiserror #[from] generates From<LoadTdddLayersError>; declared here without generic args so the signal evaluator covers it via generic-args-stripped fallback.

infrastructure::tddd::baseline_capture::.docs: Captures the current rustdoc_types::Crate JSON as the baseline (B) for a layer. New in T008 replacing the old capture_baseline_for_layer.
Force-captures the current rustdoc_types::Crate JSON as the baseline, overwriting any existing baseline. New in T008.

infrastructure::code_profile_builder::bu.docs: T008: deleted. Built a TypeGraph from SchemaExport. Replaced by SignalEvaluatorV2 which operates on rustdoc_types::Crate directly.

infrastructure::tddd::baseline_builder::.docs: T008: deleted. Built a TypeBaseline from TypeGraph. Replaced by capture_rustdoc_baseline_for_layer.

infrastructure::tddd::baseline_capture::.docs: T008: deleted. Old capture function using TypeBaseline. Replaced by capture_rustdoc_baseline_for_layer.

infrastructure::tddd::baseline_codec::de.docs: T008: deleted. Decoded JSON to TypeBaseline. Replaced by BaselineRustdocCodec::load.

infrastructure::tddd::baseline_codec::en.docs: T008: deleted. Encoded TypeBaseline to JSON. Replaced by BaselineRustdocCodec (which uses serde directly on rustdoc_types::Crate).

infrastructure::tddd::type_graph_cluster.docs: T008: deleted. Classified types in a TypeGraph into clusters. Removed with TypeGraph.

infrastructure::tddd::type_graph_export:.docs: T008: deleted. Exported TypeGraph for a layer. Removed with TypeGraph.

infrastructure::tddd::type_graph_render:.docs: T008: deleted. Rendered TypeGraph as clustered Mermaid diagram. Removed with TypeGraph.
T008: deleted. Rendered TypeGraph as flat Mermaid diagram. Removed with TypeGraph.
T008: deleted. Rendered TypeGraph overview as Mermaid. Removed with TypeGraph.
T008: deleted. Wrote TypeGraph render output to a directory. Removed with TypeGraph.
T008: deleted. Wrote TypeGraph render output to a file. Removed with TypeGraph.

infrastructure::tddd::type_signals_evalu.docs: T008: deleted. Old signal evaluation entry point using TypeBaseline + TypeGraph. Replaced by the new sotp track three-way-signals pipeline via SignalEvaluatorV2.
T008: deleted. Old validation helper for action diagnostics in the TypeBaseline-based evaluator.
T008: deleted. Old validation-and-write helper in the TypeBaseline-based evaluator.
